name: Kinfo
description_short: Verified trading journal with broker auto-sync, public track records and performance reporting for stock and options traders.
description_long:
Kinfo differentiates itself from other trading journals by focusing on verified performance tracking. When you connect your brokerage account, Kinfo automatically imports and verifies your trades, generating tamper-proof performance metrics including P&L, win rates, Sharpe ratios, and interactive charts.

The verified performance angle makes Kinfo particularly popular among traders who want to build a track record they can share publicly or use to attract followers. The social features let traders share their verified results, creating a transparent community where performance claims can be validated.

Kinfo is especially strong for options and stock traders, offering detailed breakdowns of options strategies, Greeks exposure, and sector allocation. The free tier provides basic tracking, making it accessible for traders who want to start building their verified track record.
pros: Verified performance metrics build credible track records
Social sharing with proof of performance
Automatic broker sync eliminates manual entry
cons: Limited to stocks and options only
Analytics depth not as strong as dedicated journals
meta_description: Kinfo reviewed for broker auto-sync, verified performance, public profiles, pricing, Pro tiers and stock/options journal fit.
